task: Illustratively open a drawer using an abstract robot-agent workflow.
world_state_summary: A drawer is reachable, its handle is expected to be visible, the gripper is open, and the workspace is believed clear.

main_plan.instruction: Align the gripper with the handle.
Pull the drawer using the external low-level controller.

trigger.description: The estimated handle pose confidence falls below the alignment tolerance before contact.

action.description: Pause the approach and request a refreshed handle estimate before continuing alignment.

cached_action_branches.valid_if: No contact has been made and the workspace is still believed clear.
cached_action_branches.fallback: Stop the illustrative sequence and request replanning from a fresh state summary.

trigger.description: Drawer displacement remains below the expected range after the pull begins.

action.description: Pause the pull and do not increase force based on this cached action branch.

cached_action_branches.valid_if: The executor can pause without requiring additional motion.
cached_action_branches.fallback: Use the external fallback path and request replanning.

trigger.description: Force feedback exceeds the configured illustrative threshold during the pull.

action.description: Stop the pull request and route to the external risk-control path.

cached_action_branches.valid_if: No external safety layer has issued a stronger stop or pause instruction.
cached_action_branches.fallback: Keep execution paused under the external fallback path and request replanning.

trigger.description: A human hand enters the configured workspace boundary.

action.description: Pause task execution and route to the external fallback path.

cached_action_branches.valid_if: No external safety layer has issued a stronger stop or pause instruction.
cached_action_branches.fallback: Use the external fallback path and request replanning.

replan_if: The drawer handle is no longer visible.
The drawer geometry is inconsistent with the world-state summary.
An unknown high-risk event is detected.
No cached action branch remains valid.
